diagnosis.root_cause: Slow query on the estoque dashboard, likely introduced by deploy 1.2.2 (missing index)
reasoning: db.latency_ms ~1820 is high but steady, not a spike
pool active/size = 3/10 with 0 waiting — the pool is NOT exhausted
slow-query warnings name SELECT ... FROM saldo_estoque JOIN historico_transacoes
deploy 1.2.2 at 10:30 changed the estoque dashboard query; symptoms start ~10:35
cpu 52% consistent with a query doing more work per call

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Data growth made an existing query slow
alternative_hypotheses.why_less_likely: timing lines up tightly with the 1.2.2 deploy, not gradual growth

impact.business_impact: Dashboard de estoque lento; sem erros, mas experiencia ruim

actions.action: Add an index supporting the estoque JOIN
actions.rollback: DROP INDEX if it does not help
actions.risks: Low — indexes are additive; brief write lock while building
actions.implementation: EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN the slow SELECT; CREATE INDEX on historico_transacoes(catalogo_id)

actions.action: If the index is not enough, review/rollback the 1.2.2 query change
actions.implementation: git diff 1.2.1..1.2.2 server.js on the estoque query; revert if needed and redeploy
